name: confluence-export-kit
description: Codex plugin for Confluence export and local export-index workflows: config setup, page, space, org, page-with-descendants export, automatic post-export indexing, and local Markdown indexing.

interface.shortDescription: Export Confluence content and index local Markdown exports
interface.longDescription: confluence-export-kit provides Confluence export and local export-index workflows powered by confluence-markdown-exporter. Configure auth and output defaults, export single or multiple pages, full spaces, page descendants, or full organizations to local Markdown files, then automatically index the exported output for agent-friendly reading. You can also re-index an already-exported Markdown folder.
defaultPrompt: Set my Confluence API key and default export output path so I can start exporting pages.
Export the Confluence space at <space-url> to a local Markdown folder.
Export one or more Confluence pages at <page-url> [<page-url> ...] to ./docs/.
Index a local Confluence export folder and install Reading Rules: <export-path>
